title: tithymalus neilmulleri
intro: Tithymalus neilmulleri, also known as Euphorbia neilmulleri, is a species of succulent plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its sap, which contains a compound called euphorbium, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Tithymalus neilmulleri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap is often used to make ointments, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
